meta._repo_note: Template flow for Make. Export your working scenario from Make and replace this file for a production-ready blueprint.
meta.trigger: Iterator / Airtable search on new Classified (Supply and Demand batches)

matching_rules: Location: same city OR Distance Matrix ≤ 50 miles
Category: exact match OR allowed parent/child map
Price: demand max ≥ supply price within ±20%

flow.action: Batch of Classified with Label = Supply (or Demand-first, then pair)
For each candidate, find candidate opposite-side rows in same metro/category band
Compare origin/destination; reject if distance > 50 mi
Price fit: demand budget vs supply price
Matches table; set component fields for formula OR write Match_Score from Make math
